member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient
member.summary: A low-level Host Link (Upper Link) client for KEYENCE KV series PLCs.

member.name: P:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.TraceHook
member.summary: Optional hook called for every raw frame sent and received. Useful for protocol tracing and debugging.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.ForcedSetConsecutiveAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Consecutively force-sets up to 16 bit devices starting at (STS command).

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.ForcedResetConsecutiveAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Consecutively force-resets up to 16 bit devices starting at (RSS command).

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.ReadConsecutiveLegacyAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads consecutive devices using the legacy RDE command. Prefer on current models.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.WriteConsecutiveLegacyAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes consecutive devices using the legacy WRE command. Prefer on current models.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.WriteSetValueAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a set-value (preset) for a timer or counter device (WS command). Supported device types: T, C.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.WriteSetValueConsecutiveAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes set-values (presets) for consecutive timer or counter devices (WSS command). Supported device types: T, C.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.SwitchBankAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Switches the active data bank (BE command). Valid range: 0–15.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.ReadExpansionUnitBufferAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads buffer memory from an expansion unit (URD command).
member.param: Data format suffix, e.g. ".U" or ".S". Defaults to ".U".

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient.WriteExpansionUnitBufferAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes buffer memory to an expansion unit (UWR command).
member.param: Data format suffix, e.g. ".U" or ".S". Defaults to ".U".

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClientExtensions
member.summary: Typed read/write helpers for .

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClientExtensions.ReadTypedAsync(PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads a single device value and converts it to the specified type.
member.param: Data type: "U" = ushort, "S" = short, "D" = uint, "L" = int (signed 32-bit), "F" = float.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClientExtensions.WriteTypedAsync(PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvHostLinkClient,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a single device value using the specified data type format.
member.param: Data type: "U" = ushort, "S" = short, "D" = uint, "L" = int, "F" = float.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkTransportMode
member.summary: Transport protocol for Host Link communication.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvPlcMode
member.summary: PLC operating mode.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkTraceDirection
member.summary: Direction of a traced frame.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkTraceFrame
member.summary: A raw frame captured by .

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkTraceFrame.#ctor(PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkTraceDirection,System.Byte[],System.DateTime)
member.summary: A raw frame captured by .

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkException
member.summary: Base exception for Host Link communication.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkProtocolException
member.summary: Thrown when there is an error in the protocol or unexpected response.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.HostLinkConnectionException
member.summary: Thrown when a connection error occurs.

member.name: T:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvModelInfo
member.summary: Information about a PLC model.

member.name: M:PlcComm.KvHostLink.KvModelInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Information about a PLC model.
